title: Add 'Matching Item' Option to If/Else Condition in Workflows
excerpt: Currently we have the ability to add a ‘find matching item’ action to a workflow. We would love the ability to have this as an available option under the If/Else condition. The workflow could look something like this: “I…

posts.author: Dorenkampc (Cari Dorenkamp)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently we have the ability to add a ‘find matching item’ action to a workflow. We would love the ability to have this as an available option under the If/Else condition. The workflow could look something like this: “If there is a matching item…create an item in board and connect boards.”

posts.author: mdalzell (Meredith Dalzell)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please! I need this also. I can’t figure out how to recover when the matching item is not found. The workflow just Fails. I want to use logic like: “If a matching item is not found, create an item and connect boards”.

posts.author: lakerfaninflorida (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml: It looks like there was an update recently where a true/false branch automatically is added when Find Matching Item action is selected. I haven’t tried that yet, but it sounds like it would resolve this issue.

posts.author: Dorenkampc (Cari Dorenkamp)
posts.cookedHtml: It most certainly does Bill! Thank you for sharing. I am looking into it now.

posts.author: mdalzell (Meredith Dalzell)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for pointing this out! It did work and helped a lot. Thank you!
